title: permission
description: Reloads and applies permissions. This command is for use on a dedicated server only.

fields.title: action
fields.description: The permissions action to perform: list, set, or reload.

overloads.title: List permissions
overloads.description: Lists the current permissions for all players.

overloads.title: Reload permissions
overloads.description: Reloads the permissions file from disk.
